hypothesis: Replacing Jina Reader with Firecrawl for post-rank web context improves Skills brief quality (shadow rubric: specificity, accuracy, timely hooks) while keeping HN enrichment and 7-day momentum ranking unchanged.
change_summary: Keep DIGEST_ENRICH_WEB=1 on Skills; swap web fetch provider from Jina Reader (default) to Firecrawl via DIGEST_ENRICH_WEB_PROVIDER=firecrawl (requires FIRECRAWL_API_KEY).
verdict: Shipped to production 2026-07-20 without completing the formal experiment window — operator decision to prioritize engagement and brief quality iteration over sparse click metrics. Firecrawl adapter + DIGEST_ENRICH_WEB_PROVIDER=firecrawl enabled in digest.yml. Requires FIRECRAWL_API_KEY in GHA secrets.
notes: Archived from active experiment queue 2026-07-20. Record kept for Lab history; not listed on /lab/experiments.html. Backlog ENRICH-2 closed as shipped.
